visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a person featuring long pink hair and a white lace veil, looking like a satirical bride costume. They hold a white and red megaphone close to the camera, speaking with exaggerated facial expressions. The background is a brightly lit indoor studio with white walls. (2) The scene cuts to a man wearing a blue vest with the number '1' and his name '蔡緯嘉' printed on it. He stands in a modern indoor space with large windows and wooden structures. He shouts aggressively at the camera while a group of people behind him cheer with their hands raised. (3) A woman wearing a pink vest with the number '2' and '李佩潔' printed on it appears. She holds a megaphone and speaks confidently, mocking the previous candidate. She is flanked by a group of young women who also cheer and gesture toward the camera. (4) The two main characters, the man in the blue vest and the woman in the pink vest, are shown together in a medium shot. They engage in a heated, comedic argument, pointing fingers and making funny faces. Other people in the background hold stuffed toys and look surprised. (5) A new man wearing sunglasses and a blue vest enters the frame, acting as a supporting member for the blue team. He points at the camera with a serious but comedic demeanor. (6) A woman with long black hair and a pink vest takes the megaphone and shouts a response. (7) The woman in the pink vest returns to the center, announcing new 'policies' through the megaphone with a triumphant look. (8) The video ends with a woman with reddish-brown hair holding a megaphone, urging the audience to participate, her face squeezed in a comedic expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 好里家社福協會. [Subtitle]: 第二任理事長選戰開跑. (2) [Subtitle]: 讓我們來歡迎登記1號的參選人. [Subtitle]: 蔡緯嘉. (3) [Subtitle]: 不是我還有誰!!. [Subtitle]: 三年來我們幫助了上百位孩子. [Subtitle]: 發放了上百萬的獎學金. [Subtitle]: 沒有連任還有天理嗎. (4) [Variety]: (瘋). [Variety]: (狂). (5) [Subtitle]: 接下來是登記2號參選人. [Subtitle]: 李佩潔. (6) [Subtitle]: 笑死!!. [Subtitle]: 你們好里家還不是靠我們hahababy在養. [Subtitle]: 只出一張嘴的理事長. [Subtitle]: 我們要下架他. (7) [Subtitle]: 餵餵餵餵. [Subtitle]: 李佩潔小姐. [Subtitle]: 連社工師證照都沒有. [Subtitle]: 只有一張乙級的廚師證照. (8) [Subtitle]: 丙級啦!!. [Subtitle]: 甚至是丙級. [Subtitle]: 回去hahababy賣妳的. [Subtitle]: 牛肉麵!!. (9) [Variety]: 牛肉麵啦!!. [Variety]: 牛肉麵. (10) [Subtitle]: 蔡緯嘉你連錢都管不好. [Subtitle]: 被騙了3000萬. [Subtitle]: 你知道3000萬可以幫多少小朋友嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: (別急讓我來). [Subtitle]: 來來來. [Subtitle]: 我就問啦. [Subtitle]: 中國是外國嗎. (12) [Subtitle]: 中國是. [Subtitle]: 敵國啦. (13) [Subtitle]: 那我們這邊還有沒有政見要發表的. [Subtitle]: 我在這邊宣佈. [Subtitle]: 只要我當選. [Subtitle]: 明年好里家的獎學金加碼. (14) [Slogan]: 獎學金加碼. (15) [Subtitle]: 還有呢 我們的哈姆雞蛋糕開放公益加盟. (16) [Slogan]: 開放公益加盟. (17) [Subtitle]: 誰是下任理事長. [Slogan]: ↓趕快在底下留言投票↓.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, 1 pink-haired narrator, and approximately 9 supporting staff/cast members in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male character (Cai A-jia) wears a blue work vest with campaign numbers and names. Female character (Li Pei-jie) wears a matching pink work vest. Both have casual hairstyles and energetic, exaggerated expressions.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor office or studio environment with white walls, some wooden shelving or structures, large glass windows showing greenery outside, and campaign-style posters or green logos ('h' logo) visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic male voice introduces the association election. Fast-paced synth-pop BGM with a strong electronic beat starts immediately. (2) Sudden transition to a loud, shouting male voice with high vocal tension and high arousal. Crowded cheering and high-frequency screams in the background. (3) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals a cut to a bright female voice, also shouting into a megaphone. Loud crowd cheering SFX follows her punchlines. (4) Rapid interplay between male and female voices, both using exaggerated, aggressive comedic tones. Several 'ding' and 'impact' SFX are inserted for emphasis. (5) Transition to another male voice with a lower pitch but still high energy. BGM remains consistent and upbeat. (6) A final sequence of loud female shouting, followed by a dense layer of crowd applause and cheering SFX, culminating in a high-arousal call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Candidate 1 Pitch -> Candidate 2 Pitch -> Confrontation -> Policy Reveal -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a comedic parody of a political campaign, created to promote engagement for the 'Hao Li Jia Social Welfare Association' internal election. It uses high-energy performances, variety-show style editing, and loud auditory cues to entertain the audience while asking them to vote in the comments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters wear vests with the brand name 'hahababy' and mention products like 'beef noodles' and 'egg cakes' associated with the brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video mimics the aesthetic of Taiwanese election campaigns, including the specific vest styles, megaphone usage, and aggressive rhetorical questioning.
